changelog: Feature: Custom login background image via Admin Branding settings
Feature: Dynamic app name on login page from Branding settings
Feature: Glassmorphism icon layout on login hero panel
Fix: Sidebar CSS bridge scoped to exclude dark sidebar elements
Fix: Mobile responsive layout - prevent content overflow on small screens
Fix: Backend graceful fallback for loginBackgroundUrl column sync
Major UI Redesign: Implemented Warm Luxury design system across all 34 pages
Feature: Special Day Break Time allows per-day break overrides for shifts
Fixed critical timezone bug in Weekly Menu (Monday Morning Gap)
Fixed race condition in QR Check-in (Double Scanning Prevention)
Fixed Order Creation logic duplication and timezone offsets
Feature: Group pickup stats by break time on Vendor Pickup Stats page
Feature: Group shift stats by break time on Admin Dashboard
Feature: Group shifts by break time on Weekly Menu page
Feature: Menu per break time saves to all shifts automatically
Feature: Group menus by break time on Lihat Menu page
Feature: Larger menu images with lightbox preview on Weekly Menu
Feature: Auto-select default canteen for CANTEEN role users on Check-in page
UI: Renamed labels to 'Waktu Istirahat' across all pages
Fix: Prevent duplicate blacklist entries when multiple no-shows processed in same batch
Fix: Cost report now uses actual mealPrice for ORDERED status instead of hardcoded Rp 25,000
Fix: Department stats use historical mealPrice from order
Fix: Auto backup scheduler now works correctly with startup check
Fix: Show shift names for all break times in Lihat Menu page
Fix: Show all shift names in Dashboard break time groups
Fix: Removed redundant menu mode toggle in Weekly Menu
Fix: Preserve strikes when manually unblocking user from blacklist
Fix: Auto-unblock already works when reducing strikes below threshold
Fix: Case-insensitive canteen lookup prevents duplicates during import
Fix: User count updates correctly when moving users between canteens
Fix: Correct Canteen selection on order page (RNG vs GD)
Fix: Blacklist status synchronization on User Management Page
Feature: Red warning popup for duplicate check-in with admin name display
Fix: Manual check-in now detects already picked-up orders
Fix: Canteen info now shown in check-in popup for all check-in types
Fix: Correct admin name display on manual check-in success popup
